purpose: Perf-ladder rung 1 (small): 50 nodes / 150 edges (ring backbone + seeded random extras, tools/gen_perf_fixtures.py), a 2-rule chain (seed->t1->t2) over relation labels rel0/rel1, 5 staggered-window seed facts, timesteps=10 — explicitly bounded: no ladder rung may run timesteps=-1 (the B16 hazard is structural to the ladder design, docs/perf/ladder.md). Default engine config (fp_version, parallel_computing, output_to_file all off); the t1/t2 per-timestep frames and get_time pin the derivation chain end to end. Doubles as the cold-start workload for AC-4 baselines.
provenance: perf ladder rung against docs/perf/ladder.md; fixture harness/fixtures/perf-ladder-small.graphml generated by tools/gen_perf_fixtures.py (seeded)
